notes: Coding pair session: file paths + symbol names that MUST survive compaction (Relevant files / URLs section). Tests identifier strict-preserve.

turns.content: Help me wire up Google OAuth in packages/auth/src/oauth.ts
Sure — first, what redirect URI are you registering?
https://app.example.com/auth/callback for production.
Got it. Production redirect URI = https://app.example.com/auth/callback. We will use PKCE for safety.
PKCE — code_verifier and code_challenge_method=S256 right?
Correct. Generate a 43-128 char code_verifier, hash with SHA-256 → base64url for code_challenge.
What about state? Use a CSRF token?
Yes — generate a random 32-byte state, store in HttpOnly session cookie, verify on callback.
Where do I store the access_token after exchange?
Best practice: HttpOnly + Secure + SameSite=Lax session cookie. Never localStorage.
Refresh token rotation?
On every refresh, issue a new refresh_token and invalidate the old one server-side.
Edit packages/auth/src/oauth.ts to add the exchange function.
Adding exchangeCodeForToken() in packages/auth/src/oauth.ts with PKCE verifier + state CSRF check.
Add a test in packages/auth/src/__tests__/oauth.test.ts
Created packages/auth/src/__tests__/oauth.test.ts with 4 cases: happy path, state mismatch, code_verifier mismatch, missing scope.
Run the tests
All 4 tests pass. Coverage 87%.
What scopes did you request?
openid email profile — the minimum for SSO.
Add a logout endpoint at packages/auth/src/logout.ts
Created packages/auth/src/logout.ts. Clears session cookie and revokes refresh_token via Google revocation endpoint https://oauth2.googleapis.com/revoke.
Summarize: which files did we touch, what is the prod redirect URI, what scopes, and what is the revoke endpoint?

probes.question: List the file paths, redirect URI, scopes, and revoke endpoint.

probes.criterion: Assistant correctly lists all three file paths verbatim and references PKCE + state CSRF design decisions.
